The '''''Solar Flare''''' was a modified [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] owned and operated by the [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] [[Trynic]]. The ''Solar Flare'' could often be found prowling the space lanes in the [[Minos Cluster/Legends|Minos Cluster]].
